title: Hand Block Wire Brush – Iron Grip Stiff Metal Brush, Heavy Duty Wire for Rust Removal, Brickworks, and Paint Removal
features: Multipurpose Wire Scrubbing Brush for Abrasive Cleaning – This wirebrush is made for cleaning extreme dirt and rusty surfaces. It is a handy tool for heavy dirt scrubbing for both domestic and trade use. Usually used as wire brushes for cleaning rust in metal surfaces or machinery, they can also be used to remove welding swarf, remove paints from the walls, and scrub mortar stains or mosses on patios and bricks.

5-Row Steel Brush Bristles – Composed of 5 rows of stiff wire bristles to support intense cleaning for wide surfaces or large objects. Each of the bristles is well set and is securely attached to the body of this block brush so they won’t easily fall off.

Durable Plastic Body – Measuring 17cm long and 5.5cm wide, the body of this hard wire brush is molded using a high-quality plastic material that can withstand thorough cleaning to remove heavy accumulations of dirt and rust.

Composite Handle with Comfortable Grip – Removing stubborn rust, cleaning stains for the bricks, scrubbing moss from the patio, or removing paints from the walls – all these jobs require hefty force! To ease the demanding tasks, we designed the handle of this wire brush for brickwork to be comfortable. Made with a curved and rubber-coated handle, this rust brush will make every abrasive cleaning more convenient.

Trusted Brand – Guaranteed quality by the Dustpan and Brush Store. The rust cleaner steel wire brush is manufactured to meet your exact needs. Our wide range of steel brushes for cleaning rust and dirt surfaces will reduce your efforts in dragging stubborn debris.
description: Product Description TDBS Iron Block Wire Brush The wide head with five rows of steel wire provides aggressive cleaning power, making it perfect for rust removal, paint stripping, and scrubbing hard surfaces. Get more done in fewer passes. Perfect for use as a wire brush for rust removal, metal brush for cleaning rust, oven cleaning brush, Previous page For Scrubbing Surfaces Easy to Use Ideal for removing rust, old paint, and corrosion from tough surfaces. 5 Row Bristles Steel Wire Brushes Heavy-duty steel wire brush design scrubs off rust, burnt food, flaking paint, and grime. Comfortable Handle Rubber Grip Cushioned grip for comfort and reduced fatigue—ideal for scrubbing with oil or grime. Strong Plastic Durable Body Reinforced, impact-resistant design handles the stress of tough jobs Next page 1 Easy to Use 2 Steel Wire Brushes 3 Rubber Grip 4 Durable Body Versatile Iron Wire Brush Perfect for Metal, Brick, Wood & Grills etc This iron shaped wire brush is a must-have for any cleaning, prep, or restoration project. Featuring five rows of durable steel bristles, it’s designed to power through corrosion, flaking paint, carbon buildup, and grime on tough surfaces like metal, brick, and wood. Perfect for use as a wire brush for rust removal, metal brush for cleaning rust, oven cleaning brush, or even a cast iron brush for your BBQ or fireplace. Can this wire brush remove rust from old metal furniture and tools? Yes! The 5-row steel bristles are perfect for removing surface rust, corrosion, and old paint from metal tools, furniture frames, or garden equipment. Is the brush strong enough to clean a brick BBQ or fire pit? Absolutely. This wire brush is designed to withstand high-pressure scrubbing on brick, stone, and concrete, making it ideal for outdoor cleaning tasks like BBQ pits or patio paving. How does the iron shape help compared to a standard rectangular brush? The tapered, iron-style head allows you to get into angles, grooves, and tight spots—especially useful for cleaning welds, joints, or rusted corners. Will the handle be comfortable to hold during long cleaning sessions? Yes, the rubberized coating on the handle ensures a firm grip and reduces strain and slippage, even during extended or heavy-duty scrubbing jobs. Can this be used for cleaning grills or oven grates? Definitely. It’s tough enough for burnt-on food, carbon buildup, and grease removal on cast iron BBQ grates, oven racks, or grill trays. Just wash after greasy tasks.
